use_codes.desc: POTASSIUM PHOSPHATES INJECTION IS INDICATED AS A SOURCE OF PHOSPHORUS IN INTRAVENOUS FLUIDS TO CORRECT HYPOPHOSPHATEMIA IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
1.1 In Intravenous Fluids to Correct Hypophosphatemia
POTASSIUM PHOSPHATES INJECTION is indicated as a source of phosphorus in intravenous fluids to correct hypophosphatemia
in adults and pediatric patients 12 years of age and older when oral or enteral replacement is not possible, insufficient or
c...
